data.title: test-check-plugin-test-needed.sh tests orphaned script that was deleted in ac4feeaf
data.description: tests/scripts/test-check-plugin-test-needed.sh tests plugins/dso/scripts/check-plugin-test-needed.sh which was deleted in commit ac4feeaf. The test now fails with exit 127 (command not found) on 9 of 12 assertions. The test file and its .test-index associations should be cleaned up. RED marker [test_script_exists_and_executable] added to .test-index to tolerate failures while this ticket is open.
